Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import zipfile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET

path = '/Users/dong-wankim/Downloads/독해_내지_IDML \(1\).idml'
ns = 'http://ns.adobe.com/AdobeInDesign/idml/1.0/packaging'

with zipfile.ZipFile\(path\) as zf:
    with zf.open\('designmap.xml'\) as f:
        dm = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)
    spreads = [e.get\('src'\) for e in dm.iter\(f'{{{ns}}}Spread'\) if e.get\('src'\)]

    # 3번째 spread \(첫 content 페이지\) 상세 분석
    spread_file = spreads[2]  # Spread_uc2e
    with zf.open\(spread_file\) as f:
        tree = ET.parse\(f\)
    root = tree.getroot\(\)

    frames = []
    for tf in root.iter\('TextFrame'\):
        story_id = tf.get\('ParentStory'\)
        pt = tf.find\('.//PathPointType'\)
        if pt is not None:
            coords = pt.get\('Anchor', '0 0'\).split\(\)
            y, x = float\(coords[0]\), float\(coords[1]\)
        else:
            y, x = 0.0, 0.0

        # 스토리 텍스트 미리보기
        sf = f'Stories/Story_{story_id}.xml'
        texts = []
        if sf in zf.namelist\(\):
            with zf.open\(sf\) as f2:
                t = ET.parse\(f2\).getroot\(\)
            texts = [c.text for c in t.iter\('Content'\) if c.text]
        preview = ' '.join\(texts\)[:80] if texts else '\(empty\)'
        frames.append\(\(y, x, story_id, preview\)\)

    frames.sort\(\)
    print\(f'=== {spread_file} \(총 {len\(frames\)}개 프레임\) ==='\)
    for y, x, sid, preview in frames:
        print\(f'y={y:8.1f} x={x:8.1f}  [{sid}]  {repr\(preview[:70]\)}'\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import zipfile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET

path = '/Users/dong-wankim/Downloads/독해_내지_IDML \(1\).idml'
with zipfile.ZipFile\(path\) as zf:
    # Spread_uc2e \(첫 content 페이지\) 의 모든 스토리 → 단락스타일 + 텍스트
    with zf.open\('Spreads/Spread_uc2e.xml'\) as f:
        root = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)

    for tf in root.iter\('TextFrame'\):
        sid = tf.get\('ParentStory'\)
        sf = f'Stories/Story_{sid}.xml'
        if sf not in zf.namelist\(\):
            continue
        with zf.open\(sf\) as f:
            sr = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)
        for para in sr.iter\('ParagraphStyleRange'\):
            style = para.get\('AppliedParagraphStyle', ''\).split\('/'\)[-1]
            texts = [c.text for c in para.iter\('Content'\) if c.text]
            text = ''.join\(texts\).strip\(\)[:80]
            if text:
                print\(f'[{sid}] style={style!r:40s} text={text!r}'\)
EOF)

import zipfile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET

path = '/Users/dong-wankim/Downloads/독해_내지_IDML \(1\).idml'
with zipfile.ZipFile\(path\) as zf:
    with zf.open\('Spreads/Spread_uc2e.xml'\) as f:
        root = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)

    print\("=== TextFrame 선언 순서 \(Spread XML 내 등장 순서\) ==="\)
    for i, tf in enumerate\(root.iter\('TextFrame'\)\):
        sid = tf.get\('ParentStory'\)
        sf = f'Stories/Story_{sid}.xml'
        if sf not in zf.namelist\(\):
            print\(f'{i:2d}. [{sid}] \(no story file\)'\)
            continue
        with zf.open\(sf\) as f2:
            sr = ET.parse\(f2\).getroot\(\)
        texts = [c.text for c in sr.iter\('Content'\) if c.text]
        preview = ''.join\(texts\).strip\(\)[:80]
        print\(f'{i:2d}. [{sid}] {repr\(preview\)}'\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import zipfile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET

path = '/Users/dong-wankim/Downloads/독해_내지_IDML \(1\).idml'
ns = 'http://ns.adobe.com/AdobeInDesign/idml/1.0/packaging'

def get_story_text\(zf, sid\):
    sf = f'Stories/Story_{sid}.xml'
    if sf not in zf.namelist\(\):
        return []
    with zf.open\(sf\) as f:
        root = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)
    paras = []
    for para in root.iter\('ParagraphStyleRange'\):
        parts = []
        for ch in para:
            if ch.tag == 'CharacterStyleRange':
                for sub in ch:
                    if sub.tag == 'Content' and sub.text:
                        parts.append\(sub.text\)
            elif ch.tag == 'Br':
                parts.append\('\\n'\)
        t = ''.join\(parts\).strip\(\)
        if t:
            paras.append\(t\)
    return paras

def analyze_spread\(zf, spread_file\):
    with zf.open\(spread_file\) as f:
        root = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)
    frames = []
    for tf in root.iter\('TextFrame'\):
        sid = tf.get\('ParentStory'\)
        paras = get_story_text\(zf, sid\)
        if paras:
            frames.append\(\(sid, paras\)\)
    return frames

with zipfile.ZipFile\(path\) as zf:
    with zf.open\('designmap.xml'\) as f:
        dm = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)
    spreads = [e.get\('src'\) for e in dm.iter\(f'{{{ns}}}Spread'\) if e.get\('src'\)]
    
    # 2번째, 3번째 spread 구조 비교
    for sp in spreads[2:5]:
        print\(f'\\n=== {sp} ==='\)
        frames = analyze_spread\(zf, sp\)
        for sid, paras in frames:
            preview = ' / '.join\(paras\)[:80]
            print\(f'  [{sid}] {repr\(preview\)}'\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import zipfile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET

path = '/Users/dong-wankim/Downloads/독해_내지_IDML \(1\).idml'

def get_story_text\(zf, sid\):
    sf = f'Stories/Story_{sid}.xml'
    if sf not in zf.namelist\(\):
        return '\(no file\)'
    with zf.open\(sf\) as f:
        root = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)
    texts = [c.text for c in root.iter\('Content'\) if c.text]
    return ''.join\(texts\).strip\(\)[:80] or '\(empty\)'

with zipfile.ZipFile\(path\) as zf:
    with zf.open\('Spreads/Spread_ude9.xml'\) as f:
        root = ET.parse\(f\).getroot\(\)
    print\("=== Spread_ude9 ALL TextFrames \(빈 것 포함\) ==="\)
    for i, tf in enumerate\(root.iter\('TextFrame'\)\):
        sid = tf.get\('ParentStory'\)
        text = get_story_text\(zf, sid\)
        print\(f'{i:2d}. [{sid}] {repr\(text\)}'\)
EOF)

prs = Presentation\('template.pptx'\)

        print\(f'  [{sh.shape_type}] {sh.name}: left={sh.left} top={sh.top} w={sh.width} h={sh.height}'\)
